metadata.name: Sol Ring mana ability — tap for {C}{C}
metadata.description: p1 has a Sol Ring on the battlefield (untapped). p1 activates Sol Ring's mana ability to add {C}{C} to their mana pool. Tests that mana abilities don't use the stack (CR 605.3), execute immediately, and add colorless mana to the pool.
metadata.generation_notes: Sol Ring oracle: '{T}: Add {C}{C}.' CR 605.3: Mana abilities don't use the stack and resolve immediately. Tapping Sol Ring adds 2 colorless to mana pool. Note: the replay harness processes activate_ability with action='tap_for_mana' — this triggers the mana ability execution path. After activation: Sol Ring is tapped, p1 has {C}{C} in pool.

script.step_note: p1 activates Sol Ring's mana ability to add {C}{C}.

actions.description: Initial: Sol Ring on battlefield untapped, empty mana pool

actions.note: CR 605.3: p1 activates Sol Ring's mana ability: tap Sol Ring, add {C}{C}. Mana abilities don't use the stack.

actions.description: After activation: Sol Ring tapped, {C}{C} in mana pool, stack still empty
actions.note: Mana ability resolved immediately without the stack. Sol Ring is tapped.
